title: cyphia subtubulata
intro: Cyphia subtubulata, also known as the small-flowered cyphian or mountain cyphian, is a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cyphia subtubulata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate rheumatic pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Cyphia subtubulata often involve infusions or decoctions made from its leaves and stems, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments.
